title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Shaadi.com Global Group

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Shaadi.com Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Shaadi.com Global Group, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Ludhiana operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Shaadi.com Global Group:
Shaadi.com Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shaadi.com Global Group!
